plan_summary: StackingClassifier (RF + LR meta) with log-transformed Fare, HasCabin, Title, FamilySize features for Titanic binary classification
reviewer_reasoning: Iteration 6 is the new best model (AUC 0.8560, +0.0173 vs previous, +0.0115 vs prior best iter-3). Stacking broke through the 2-iteration plateau. Overfitting is low (4.2% train/val gap, down from 8.6% in iter-5). No leakage detected. All risk flags clear. However, the stacking approach has been introduced in this iteration only and has clear untapped potential: better base learners (XGBoost, LightGBM), meta-learner tuning, and cross-val stacking have not been explored. Continuing is warranted.
router_reasoning: Metric is improving and at a new best. Stacking is a newly introduced technique class with significant unexplored headroom: current base learners are RF + LR only, meta-learner is default LogisticRegression, no gradient-boosted base estimators tried. Adding XGBoost or LightGBM as base estimators and tuning the meta-learner is the highest-value next step.
